item.name: Catching Carp
item.description:
If only it knew where to find a pitching carp.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Found in freshwater sources across Yanxia, these shy carp prefer to remain in shallow waters for the majority of their lives, hiding under the leaves and roots of the local aquatic plant life. During spawning season, however, they become far more aggressive─if a tranquil pond suddenly comes alive with the sound of splashing, catching carp are likely to blame.
